concept: Complexity and variation in multidimensional data landscapes
metaphor: A dramatic mountain range representing peaks, valleys, and irregular patterns in data distribution
prompt: Aerial photography of a dramatic mountain range at dawn. The terrain is highly complex, featuring deep valleys, sharp ridges, broad basins, and jagged peaks. Low mist settles into some of the valleys, enhancing depth and contrast. Soft dawn light sweeps across the landscape, revealing intricate textures and variations in elevation. The scene is captured from directly above at a slightly oblique angle, emphasizing the scale and structure of the terrain. No human figures. No text, no labels.
